positive: A central, minimalist silhouette of a rising sun over a stylized mountain range, rendered in clean, bold linework. The composition should feature a strong contrast between deep indigo night sky and brilliant golden sunrise light. Include geometric, ethereal floral elements framing the central sun motif. The style is high-contrast, vintage etching meets modern spiritual art, suitable for a black or cream background print. Flat design, poster art, vector illustration, clean lines, symmetry, centered composition, highly detailed and crisp.
negative: blur, grainy, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logos, trademarks, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low resolution, noise, muted colors, photographic, photorealistic, disfigured, abstract, cartoonish
